title: Espanso Match File Schema (Merged)
description: Unified validation schema for Espanso match files (.yml). Combines the official Espanso match schema (structural correctness, full property coverage, IANA timezone and BCP47 locale enums) with custom extension constraints and prose descriptions with doc links. Used by `snippet validate`. Conflict resolutions: trigger requirement enforced (custom wins); html/markdown added as valid replacements (official wins); vars use per-type oneOf branches (official wins); descriptions/links from custom. See https://espanso.org/docs/

$schema.description: URI reference to the JSON schema used to validate this file. Optional but useful for editor support.

matches.description: Array of match entries. Each entry defines a trigger and its replacement. See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/basics/

global_vars.description: Variables available to all matches in this file. Defined once and usable across any match via {{var_name}}. See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/basics/#global-variables

imports.description: Import matches from other files outside the standard Espanso config folder. See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/organizing-matches/#imports

items.description: Path to a YAML Espanso match file or package.

extra_includes.description: Load matches from files that extend existing file functionality. Useful for per-app configuration. See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/organizing-matches/#using-imports-to-group-private-match-sets-advanced

items.description: Path to a YAML Espanso config file or package.

extra_excludes.description: Disable configuration files or packages for a specific application. See https://espanso.org/docs/configuration/include-and-exclude/#excluding-a-package

items.description: Path to a YAML Espanso config file or package.

anchors.description: Top-level YAML anchor definitions reusable across matches via aliases (*anchor_name). See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/extensions/#anchors-and-aliases

match.description: A single match entry: a trigger and its replacement. See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/basics/

trigger.description: The text you type to trigger this expansion. Use `trigger` for a single trigger string. See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/basics/

triggers.description: An array of trigger strings, any of which will expand this match. Use when you want multiple aliases for the same replacement. See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/basics/#multiple-triggers

regex.description: A regular expression that, when matched, triggers this expansion. Follows Espanso's regex syntax. See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/regex-triggers/

replace.description: The static text replacement. The trigger is replaced with this string. Use {{var_name}} to include variable output. See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/basics/#static-matches

form.description: A form layout string rendered as a dialog the user fills out before expansion. Fields are denoted with [[field_name]] syntax. See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/forms/

form_fields.description: Configuration for individual form fields referenced in the `form` layout. Keys must match [[field_name]] entries in the layout. See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/forms/#controls

image_path.description: Path to an image file. The trigger is replaced with the image rather than text. See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/basics/#image-matches

html.description: An HTML string replacement, outputting rich text when the app supports it. See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/basics/#rich-text

markdown.description: A Markdown string replacement, outputting rich text. An alternative to `html`. See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/basics/#rich-text

paragraph.description: When true, prevents Espanso from injecting a trailing newline after a markdown replacement. See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/basics/#rich-text

vars.description: Variables whose values are computed at expansion time and injected into the replacement via {{var_name}}. See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/variables/

label.description: Override the display name of this match in the Espanso search bar. See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/basics/#search-labels

word.description: When true, the match only triggers if surrounded by word separators (spaces, commas, newlines). Useful for spell-check replacements. See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/basics/#word-triggers

left_word.description: When true, the match only triggers if there is a word separator to the left of the trigger. See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/basics/#word-triggers

right_word.description: When true, the match only triggers if there is a word separator to the right of the trigger. See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/basics/#word-triggers

propagate_case.description: When true, expands the match while preserving the casing of the trigger. See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/basics/#case-propagation

uppercase_style.description: Controls how uppercase casing is applied when `propagate_case` is true and the trigger is typed with initial caps. `capitalize` capitalizes the first word; `capitalize_words` capitalizes every word; `uppercase` renders the whole replacement in caps. Requires `propagate_case: true`. See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/basics/#case-propagation

passive_only.description: When true, this match only expands in passive mode. A deprecated feature; see https://espanso.org/docs/legacy/passive-mode/

force_mode.description: Override the global text injection mechanism for this match. `clipboard` injects via the clipboard; `keys` simulates keypresses. See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/basics/#injection-mechanism

force_clipboard.description: Deprecated. Previously forced clipboard-based injection. Use `force_mode: clipboard` instead.

debug.description: When true, enables verbose debug output for this match in `espanso log`. See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/extensions/#debugging

search_terms.description: Extra keywords that make this match findable in the Espanso search bar. These terms do not affect triggering. See https://espanso.org/docs/get-started/#search-bar

comment.description: A human-readable annotation attached directly to this match entry.

anchor.description: Define a YAML anchor on this match for reuse elsewhere via *anchor_name. See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/extensions/#anchors-and-aliases

var.description: A variable whose value is computed at expansion time using one of Espanso's extension types. See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/extensions/

oneOf.$comment: shell var — runs a shell command and captures output

name.description: The variable name, referenced in the replacement as {{name}}. See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/variables/

cmd.description: The shell command to run. Its stdout becomes the variable value. See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/extensions/#shell-extension

shell.description: The shell to run the command in. Defaults to the system shell. See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/extensions/#choosing-the-shell

trim.description: When true, trims whitespace and trailing newlines from the command output. See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/extensions/#trimming-the-output

debug.description: When true, logs the shell extension result to `espanso log`. See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/extensions/#debugging

inject_vars.description: When true, other variable values are injected into this variable's params before evaluation.

depends_on.description: List of variable names this variable depends on. Forces evaluation order. See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/variables/#specify-the-depends_on-option-when-needed

oneOf.$comment: script var — runs an external script and captures output

name.description: The variable name, referenced in the replacement as {{name}}.

args.description: Arguments to the script runner. First element is the interpreter (e.g. 'ruby'), second is the script path, remaining are passed as arguments. No upper limit on count. See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/extensions/#script-extension

trim.description: When true, trims whitespace and trailing newlines from the script output.

inject_vars.description: When true, other variable values are injected into this variable's params before evaluation.

depends_on.description: List of variable names this variable depends on. Forces evaluation order. See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/variables/#specify-the-depends_on-option-when-needed

oneOf.$comment: date var — inserts a formatted date/time string

name.description: The variable name, referenced in the replacement as {{name}}.

format.description: A strftime-compatible format string defining how the date is rendered (e.g. '%Y-%m-%d'). See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/extensions/#date-extension

offset.description: Seconds to add to the current time before formatting. Accepts a number or a variable-injection string like {{hours_offset}}. See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/extensions/#future-and-past-dates

locale.description: BCP47 locale code forcing locale-specific date formatting (e.g. 'en-US', 'ja-JP'). See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/extensions/#advanced-localized-dates

debug.description: When true, logs the date extension result to `espanso log`.

inject_vars.description: When true, other variable values are injected into this variable's params before evaluation.

depends_on.description: List of variable names this variable depends on. Forces evaluation order. See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/variables/#specify-the-depends_on-option-when-needed

oneOf.$comment: echo var — outputs a fixed string value

name.description: The variable name, referenced in the replacement as {{name}}.

echo.description: The fixed string value this variable will output. See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/extensions/#echo-extension

trim.description: When true, trims whitespace from the echo value.

debug.description: When true, logs the echo extension result to `espanso log`.

inject_vars.description: When true, other variable values are injected into this variable's params before evaluation.

depends_on.description: List of variable names this variable depends on. Forces evaluation order.

oneOf.$comment: clipboard var — inserts the current clipboard contents. No params needed.

name.description: The variable name, referenced in the replacement as {{name}}.

inject_vars.description: When true, other variable values are injected into this variable's params before evaluation.

depends_on.description: List of variable names this variable depends on. Forces evaluation order.

oneOf.$comment: choice var — presents a selection dialog; the user picks a value at expansion time

name.description: The variable name, referenced in the replacement as {{name}}.

values.description: The list of options to present. Each item is a plain string or an object with 'label' (display text) and 'id' (returned value). See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/extensions/#advanced-use-with-ids

label.description: Text shown in the selection dialog.

id.description: Value returned when this option is chosen.

debug.description: When true, logs the choice extension result to `espanso log`.

inject_vars.description: When true, other variable values are injected into this variable's params before evaluation.

depends_on.description: List of variable names this variable depends on. Forces evaluation order.

oneOf.$comment: form var — renders an inline form within a variable for complex multi-field expansions

name.description: The variable name. Fields are referenced in the replacement as {{name.field_name}} using dot notation.

layout.description: The form layout string. Fields use [[field_name]] syntax and are referenced in the replacement as {{var_name.field_name}}. See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/forms/

fields.description: Configuration for individual form fields referenced in the layout.

debug.description: When true, logs the form extension result to `espanso log`.

inject_vars.description: When true, other variable values are injected into this variable's params before evaluation.

depends_on.description: List of variable names this variable depends on. Forces evaluation order.

oneOf.$comment: random var — picks one value at random from a list at expansion time

name.description: The variable name, referenced in the replacement as {{name}}.

choices.description: The list of strings Espanso randomly selects from at expansion time. See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/extensions/#random-extension

oneOf.$comment: match var — expands another match inline by its trigger

name.description: The variable name, referenced in the replacement as {{name}}.

trigger.description: The trigger of the match to expand inline at the variable's position.

inject_vars.description: When true, other variable values are injected into this variable's params before evaluation.

depends_on.description: List of variable names this variable depends on. Forces evaluation order.

anchor.description: A YAML anchor name enabling reuse of match content via aliases (*anchor_name). See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/extensions/#anchors-and-aliases

form_field_definition.description: A map of field names to their configuration. Each key must correspond to a [[field_name]] entry in the form layout. Each value is either a plain text field or a choice/list field. See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/forms/#controls

form_multiline_field.$comment: A plain text or multiline text form field. This is the default field type — no type or values required.

multiline.description: When true, renders the field as a multiline text area instead of a single-line input. See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/forms/#text-fields

default.description: Default value pre-filled in the field. See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/forms/#text-fields

form_choice_or_list_field.$comment: A choice or list dropdown form field. Requires both type and values.

type.description: The form control type. `choice` renders a dropdown; `list` renders a scrollable list box. See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/forms/#controls

values.description: The selectable options. Can be an array of strings or a YAML multiline string (one option per line). See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/forms/#choice-box

trim_string_values.description: When true and values is a multiline string, Espanso trims each value and removes empty ones. Use with the YAML pipe operator on the values key. See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/forms/#choice-box
